title: Prefetch, Consumer Concurrency, Capacity, and Fairness · Type Recall
summary: A delayed handoff reconstructs prefetch, consumer concurrency, capacity, and fairness from bounded publish, route, delivery, acknowledgement, and recovery evidence, challenges one misconception, and revises the prefetch, concurrency, and capacity budget model. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for prefetch, concurrency, and capacity budget model after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence d…
objectives: Explain RabbitMQ per-consumer prefetch, deprecated global QoS, in-flight races, quorum caps, and the zero-means-unbounded hazard.
Bound concurrent handlers by CPU, memory, message bytes, downstream pools, deadlines, tenant fairness, and shutdown capacity.
Interpret consumer capacity with delivery rate, processing latency, ready and unacked depth, dependency saturation, and queue single-core limits.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Prefetch Window Semantics · changed case · Review Prefetch Window Semantics
steps.instruction:
review case — A review messaging team handles case 9018 in a partner publisher using an unroutable changed topic key. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to combine prefetch, active handlers, downstream capacity, and message-byte budgets; keep credentials and connection URLs out of learner output; then close the channel while one acknowledgement decision is still pending. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

Which action demonstrates Prefetch Window Semantics without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Prefetch Window Semantics · changed case · Review Prefetch Window Semantics.

For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Prefetch Window Semantics · changed case · Review Prefetch Window Semantics, keep Prefetch Window Semantics connected to executable TypeScript messaging decision evidence.
